visa_types.name: Short Stay Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Please see the checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4j3jLHVVRNyXscF7ZTKtJF/5eb79ca3b23e014a65c1cdfa52267588/supporting-documents.pdf) for your visa category with the complete list of requirements.
To download a form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Applicants applying at the Greece Visa Application Centre shall be levied a non-refundable service charge in addition to the Visa Fee.

[Table:Short Stay Visa]

Please note exemption of visa fee applies for:
- Children 0-6 years.
- Family members of EU/EEA and Swiss citizens.
- School pupils, students, post-graduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training.
- Researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research.
- Representatives of non-profit organisations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organisations.
- Holders of diplomatic and service passports
- Participants aged 25 or less in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events, organized by non-profit organisations.
Service charge applicable when applying at the Greece Visa Application Centre:

[Table:Short Stay Visa]

*Please note that the service fee is inclusive of VAT.
Click for the price list of Additional Services (http://liftpoc.vfsglobal.com.s3-website.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/tun/en/grc/additional-services).
- The applicable visa fee in Tunisian Dinar (TND) is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- All fees should be paid in cash in Tunisian dinar only.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only Service Charge.
- The fees are non-refundable and non-transferable.
visa_types.processing_time:
The earliest you can apply is 6 months before you intend to travel. You should apply no later than 15 working days before your trip.
The Embassy checks the application and usually reaches a decision within 15 calendar days after having submitted the application.
You can track the status of your application using your track & trace code (http://liftpoc.vfsglobal.com.s3-website.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/tun/en/grc/track-application). If you have any questions about the status of your application, please contact the Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.forms:
The visa application form can be downloaded and printed from the link below in PDF format. Form is also available at the Visa Application Centre (free of charge).

Schengen Visa Application Form  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/WKyvG1nn42SVKilJJxXny/28100a45d06188aeb0e87469282b3c49/application-form-schegen-visa.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visa is an authorization issued by one of the member states of the Schengen area with a view to transit through or an intended stay in the territory of the member states for a duration of up to 90 days in any 180-day period.
A uniform Schengen visa allows the holder a stay of up to 90 days within any 180-day period, and it is valid within the territory of the following countries:
Greece, Austria, Belgium, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Hungary, Iceland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Lichtenstein, Luxembourg, Malta, the Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden and Switzerland.
Select your short-stay Schengen visa:
- Business
- Tourism
- Family and Private Visit Visa
- Medical treatment
- Official visit
- Cultural, sports, education, research or vocational training
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visa is an authorization issued by one of the member states of the Schengen area with a view to transit through or an intended stay in the territory of the member states for a duration of up to 90 days in any 180-day period.
A uniform Schengen visa allows the holder a stay of up to 90 days within any 180-day period, and it is valid within the territory of the following countries:
Greece, Austria, Belgium, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Hungary, Iceland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Lichtenstein, Luxembourg, Malta, the Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden and Switzerland.
Select your short-stay Schengen visa:
- Business
- Tourism
- Family and Private Visit Visa
- Medical treatment
- Official visit
- Cultural, sports, education, research or vocational training

## Visa Fees
Applicants applying at the Greece Visa Application Centre shall be levied a non-refundable service charge in addition to the Visa Fee.

[Table:Short Stay Visa]

Please note exemption of visa fee applies for:
- Children 0-6 years.
- Family members of EU/EEA and Swiss citizens.
- School pupils, students, post-graduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training.
- Researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research.
- Representatives of non-profit organisations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organisations.
- Holders of diplomatic and service passports
- Participants aged 25 or less in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events, organized by non-profit organisations.
Service charge applicable when applying at the Greece Visa Application Centre:

[Table:Short Stay Visa]

*Please note that the service fee is inclusive of VAT.
Click for the price list of Additional Services (http://liftpoc.vfsglobal.com.s3-website.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/tun/en/grc/additional-services).
- The applicable visa fee in Tunisian Dinar (TND) is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- All fees should be paid in cash in Tunisian dinar only.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only Service Charge.
- The fees are non-refundable and non-transferable.

## Documents Required
Please see the checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4j3jLHVVRNyXscF7ZTKtJF/5eb79ca3b23e014a65c1cdfa52267588/supporting-documents.pdf) for your visa category with the complete list of requirements.
To download a form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications: 
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 35 – 45 mm
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be shut
For further details with samples Click Here (http://ec.europa.eu/dgs/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas/visa-policy/docs/icao_photograph_guidelines_en.pdf)
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above the submission officer might ask you to provide new photos and you may choose an additional service to capture the photos on the day of the appointment at the visa application center.

## Processing Time
The earliest you can apply is 6 months before you intend to travel. You should apply no later than 15 working days before your trip.
The Embassy checks the application and usually reaches a decision within 15 calendar days after having submitted the application.
You can track the status of your application using your track & trace code (http://liftpoc.vfsglobal.com.s3-website.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/tun/en/grc/track-application). If you have any questions about the status of your application, please contact the Visa Application Centre.

## Download Forms
The visa application form can be downloaded and printed from the link below in PDF format. Form is also available at the Visa Application Centre (free of charge).

Schengen Visa Application Form  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/WKyvG1nn42SVKilJJxXny/28100a45d06188aeb0e87469282b3c49/application-form-schegen-visa.pdf)

visa_types.name: Long Stay Visa
visa_types.overview: A long - term visa (National visa - D Type Visa) is an authorization issued by the competent Greek authorities for the entry and stay of third - country nationals in Greek territory for a period exceeding 90 and up to 365 days, according to the respective national legislation or European Union law on the residence status of third - country nationals.
visa_types.full_text: A long - term visa (National visa - D Type Visa) is an authorization issued by the competent Greek authorities for the entry and stay of third - country nationals in Greek territory for a period exceeding 90 and up to 365 days, according to the respective national legislation or European Union law on the residence status of third - country nationals.
